item.title: Marksans Pharma Ltd Surges 8.77% to Day's High of Rs 203.45 — Outperforms Sector by 6.99 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex edged up a modest 0.17% on 6 May 2026, while Marksans Pharma Ltd surged 8.77%, touching an intraday high of Rs 203.45. This 6.99-percentage-point outperformance over the Pharmaceuticals & Biotechnology sector signals a distinctly stock-specific rally rather than a broad market lift. Time: 6 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts S J S Enterprises Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 1928.4
item.description: With a remarkable rally that has more than doubled its value over the past year, S J S Enterprises Ltd surged to a fresh 52-week high of Rs 1928.4 on 6 May 2026, showcasing robust momentum backed by a suite of bullish technical indicators. Time: 16 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Sky Gold & Diamonds Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 473
item.description: With a decisive break above Rs 473 on 6 Jun 2026, Sky Gold & Diamonds Ltd has reached a fresh 52-week high, extending its impressive rally that has delivered over 53% returns in the past year. This milestone reflects a confluence of strong technical momentum and sustained operational growth, setting the stock apart in the Gems, Jewellery And Watches sector. Time: 16 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Nitta Gelatin India Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 1215
item.description: Surging past its previous peaks, Nitta Gelatin India Ltd touched a fresh 52-week high of Rs 1215 on 6 May 2026, marking a remarkable 56.1% gain over the past year. This milestone comes amid a backdrop of strong technical momentum and a market environment where the broader Sensex remains subdued. Time: 16 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Sun Pharmaceutical Industries Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 1843.95
item.description: With a close approach to its 52-week high at Rs 1843.95 on 6 Jun 2026, Sun Pharmaceutical Industries Ltd has demonstrated notable price momentum, supported by a broad alignment of technical indicators across weekly and monthly timeframes. Time: 17 minutes ago

item.title: Yaan Enterprises Ltd Hits All-Time High of Rs 122 as Momentum Builds Across Timeframes
item.description: Extending its remarkable rally, Yaan Enterprises Ltd surged 5.13% on 6 May 2026 to close at Rs 122, marking a fresh all-time high just 0.78% above its previous 52-week peak. This micro-cap stock in the Tour, Travel Related Services sector has outpaced the Sensex by a wide margin, continuing a strong upward trajectory across multiple timeframes. Time: 17 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Granules India Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 736.6
item.description: Surging past its previous peaks, Granules India Ltd touched a new 52-week high of Rs 736.6 on 6 May 2026, marking a significant milestone in its price momentum. This rally has been underpinned by a confluence of robust technical indicators and sustained buying interest, setting the stage for a compelling momentum narrative. Time: 17 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts SG Finserve Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 600
item.description: Surging past its previous peaks, SG Finserve Ltd touched a fresh 52-week high of Rs 600 on 6 May 2026, marking a remarkable 53.9% gain over the past year. This milestone reflects a powerful confluence of technical momentum and sustained price strength that has propelled the stock well ahead of the broader market's subdued performance. Time: 17 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Sunflag Iron & Steel Company Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 393.8
item.description: With a decisive surge to Rs 393.8 on 6 May 2026, Sunflag Iron & Steel Company Ltd has reached a fresh 52-week high, marking a remarkable 72.7% gain over the past year. This rally is underpinned by a confluence of bullish technical indicators and sustained price momentum that has propelled the stock well above its key moving averages. Time: 17 minutes ago

item.title: S J S Enterprises Ltd Hits All-Time High of Rs 1,923.55 as Momentum Builds Across Timeframes
item.description: S J S Enterprises Ltd, a key player in the Auto Components & Equipments sector, reached a significant milestone on 06 May 2026 as its stock price touched an all-time high of ₹1,923.55. This achievement reflects the company’s sustained growth and strong financial fundamentals, underscoring its prominent position within the small-cap segment. Time: 19 minutes ago

item.title: Aye Finance Ltd Surges 7.58% to Day's High of Rs 144.9 — Outperforms Sector by 6.51 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex edged up by a modest 0.18% on 6 May 2026, while Aye Finance Ltd surged 7.58%, outperforming its Non Banking Financial Company (NBFC) sector by 6.51 percentage points. This sharp single-session gain, culminating in an intraday high of Rs 144.9, stands out as a significant stock-specific event rather than a reflection of broader market strength. Time: 21 minutes ago

item.title: Protean eGov Technologies Ltd Surges 7.16% to Day's High of Rs 570 — Outperforms Sector by 7.96 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex edged up by a modest 0.18% on 6 May 2026, while Protean eGov Technologies Ltd surged 7.16%, reaching an intraday high of Rs 570. This 7.96-percentage-point outperformance over its sector signals a distinctly stock-specific rally rather than a market-wide lift. Time: 21 minutes ago

item.title: Fusion Finance Ltd Surges 7.18% to Day's High of Rs 215.95 — Outperforms Sector by 6.31 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex edged up by a modest 0.2% on 6 May 2026, while Fusion Finance Ltd surged 7.18%, touching a day high of Rs 215.95. This 6.31 percentage-point outperformance over its sector highlights a distinctly stock-specific rally rather than a broad market lift. Time: 21 minutes ago

item.title: R Systems International Ltd Surges 7.81% to Day's High of Rs 290 — Outperforms Sector by 7.86 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex edged up a modest 0.18% on 6 May 2026, while R Systems International Ltd surged 7.81%, closing near its intraday peak of Rs 290. This 7.86 percentage-point outperformance over its sector signals a distinctly stock-specific rally rather than a market-wide lift. Time: 21 minutes ago

item.title: Mangal Electrical Industries Ltd Locks at Upper Circuit With 5.0% Gain — Buyers Queue, Sellers Absent
item.description: At Rs 346.55, the buying was done — not because demand dried up, but because the exchange wouldn't let the stock go any higher. Mangal Electrical Industries Ltd locked at its upper circuit of 5.0% on 6 May 2026, with buyers queuing and no sellers willing to part with shares. Time: 21 minutes ago

item.title: Borana Weaves Ltd Locks at Upper Circuit With 5% Gain — Buyers Queue, Sellers Absent
item.description: At Rs 359.45, the buying was done — not because demand dried up, but because the exchange wouldn't let the stock go any higher. Borana Weaves Ltd locked at its upper circuit of 5% on 05 May 2026, with buyers queuing and no sellers willing to part with shares. Time: 21 minutes ago

item.title: SRF Ltd. Rallies 6.07% and Approaches 100 DMA Resistance — A Key Technical Test Ahead
item.description: The Sensex edged up by a modest 0.18% on 6 May 2026, while SRF Ltd. surged 6.07%, outperforming its Specialty Chemicals sector by 3.75 percentage points. This sharp single-session gain stands out as a stock-specific event amid a broadly flat market, raising the question of whether this rally signals a genuine breakout or a technical bounce within a mixed trend. Time: 21 minutes ago

item.title: Quest Laboratories Ltd Locks at Upper Circuit With 5.0% Gain — Buyers Queue, Sellers Absent
item.description: At Rs 143.90, the buying was done — not because demand dried up, but because the exchange wouldn't let the stock go any higher. Quest Laboratories Ltd locked at its upper circuit of 5.0% on 06 May 2026, with buyers queuing and no sellers willing to part with shares. Time: 21 minutes ago

item.title: Vishnu Prakash R Punglia Ltd Locks at Upper Circuit With 5% Gain — Buyers Queue, Sellers Absent
item.description: At Rs 44.41, the buying was done — not because demand dried up, but because the exchange wouldn't let the stock go any higher. Vishnu Prakash R Punglia Ltd locked at its upper circuit of 5% on 6 May 2026, with buyers queuing and no sellers willing to part with shares. Time: 21 minutes ago

item.title: Delta Corp Ltd. Surges 7.48% to Day's High of Rs 73.5 — Outperforms Sector by 2.46 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex edged up by a modest 0.20% on 6 May 2026, while Delta Corp Ltd. surged 7.48%, outperforming its Leisure Services sector by 2.46 percentage points. This sharp single-session gain stands out as a significant stock-specific event, raising questions about whether this is a genuine recovery or a continuation of existing momentum. Time: 21 minutes ago
